name: Train ticket between Chur and St. Moritz

longDescription: Discover Train ticket between Chur and St. Moritz in Switzerland.

subcategory.title: Train ticket
subcategory.description: Find your perfect train ticket for your trip to Switzerland here. Switzerland is a country that is very well connected by train. Whether it's for an experience journey, a panoramic train ride, a culinary experience or simply to get from point A to point B, a train ride in Switzerland is (almost) always associated with impressive views. Thus, a train ride serves not only as a means of transportation, but as a destination in itself. Among the most famous train rides in Switzerland are the Glacier Express, the Bernina Express, the Gotthard Panorama Express, and the Golden Pass Line.

gallery.alternativeText: Train to St. Moritz: picturesque scene with red train in the Swiss Alps, ideal for nature lovers.
Albula Valley: picturesque landscape with typical chalets, mountains, and green meadows in summer.
Bergün: enchanting winter village in the Swiss Alps with snow-covered houses and mountains.
Bergün: idyllic village with a church and adjacent nature in summer.
Chur: picturesque cityscape with mountains and historic buildings, ideal for explorations.
Landwasser Viaduct: impressive view of the railway bridge in the winter landscape of Switzerland
Landwasser Viaduct in winter with snow-covered mountains and a red train, impressive natural backdrop.
Rhaetian Railway: Fascination of the train ride through the Swiss Alps, ideal for nature and travel enthusiasts.
Rhaetian Railway in winter, snow-covered mountains and idyllic landscape in the Alps.
Rhaetian Railway travels through a green mountain landscape in summer. Beautiful nature. Experience travel adventures.
Rhaetian Railway at St. Moritz station with impressive mountain scenery and clear skies.
St. Moritz: picturesque view of the lake and the town with mountains in the background.
